hero.title: A reliable lock - guarantees your safe life
hero.description: We manufacture modern, durable and long-lasting locks for MDF and aluminum doors.

about.title: Custode — symbol of trust and safety
about.description: Custode manufactures high-quality locks for MDF and aluminum doors. Our products, created using modern technologies and durable materials, ensure security, durability and convenience. We pay attention to every detail and offer reliable long-term solutions.

ms_212_c_be.name: MS 212 C-BE
ms_212_c_be.description: Powerful petrol chainsaw for cutting firewood and maintenance work

thoughts.title: What Our Customers Say
thoughts.description: The greatest value for us is the trust of our customers. People who use Custode products highly appreciate the quality, reliability, and convenience. Their positive feedback motivates us to keep improving and growing.

items.name: Xasan Olimov
items.text: We used Custode locks in several projects and are very satisfied. High quality, easy installation, and very smooth operation. Most importantly—reliable. I highly recommend them.

items.name: Odilbek
items.text: These locks exceeded our expectations. The materials are durable, and the design is modern, fitting any door. It is the best choice for security. We are happy with this partnership.

items.name: Asqar Muxtarov
items.text: We chose this brand for our new office and made the right decision. They work quietly and are very convenient to use. Perfect balance of price and quality. I definitely suggest it.

items.name: Jo'rabek Izzatullayev
items.text: The durability and appearance of these locks impressed us. We finally found the high-quality product we were looking for. Service and delivery are also top-notch. Thank you!

items.name: Bunyodbek
items.text: Custode locks are a true mark of quality. Every detail is well-thought-out, and they work flawlessly. We trusted this brand with our home security and are very pleased. Highly recommended.

info.address: Uzb. Toshkent sh. Yangi hayot, Navruz 23-uy

footer.description: Custode company produces high-quality locks for MDF and aluminum doors. Our products, created using modern technologies and durable materials, provide security, durability and convenience. We pay attention to every detail and offer our customers reliable and long-lasting solutions.
